name: Alpine Livery Co
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services Business Name Search (JS form; no public scrape result for this name)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate); SAFER keyword search 'ALPINE LIVERY' and broader 'ALPINE' returned no matching records. Morristown Town Clerk operates a Livery/Limo/Taxi License regime — entity likely licensed locally rather than at federal level. Free web searches did not surface a NJ DORES entity record or officers; deeper diligence requires querying NJ DORES (njportal.com/DOR/BusinessNameSearch) or Status Report ($) and the Morristown Clerk's Office license file.

name: East Side Car & Limo Inc
registry_source: WA Corporations and Charities Filing System (ccfs.sos.wa.gov) — interactive UI only; no scrapable name match returned via free queries
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate); SAFER keyword searches 'EAST SIDE CAR & LIMO', 'EAST SIDE CAR LIMO', and 'EAST SIDE CAR' returned no records. Distinct from the larger Redmond-area operators 'Eastside Limousine, Inc.' (19404 NE 68th Way) and 'Eastside Town Car & Limousine, LLC' (Bellevue) — neither matches 9407 176th Pl NE. WA limousine operators must hold a WA DOL limousine carrier permit and display UBI on advertising; subject likely permitted at state level but does not appear in FMCSA SAFER.

name: Continental Limousine
registry_source: NJ DORES Business Name Search (interactive form; not directly scrapable)
fmcsa_confidence: high (no record at this NJ address)
notes: no USDOT at the Westwood NJ address. SAFER keyword search 'CONTINENTAL LIMOUSINE' returns three carriers: USDOT 961391 (Long Beach CA), USDOT 1701443 (Fort Worth TX), USDOT 1817117 (Continental Limousine LLC, Valley Stream NY — confirmed not Westwood NJ; private passenger non-business, intrastate only, 1 power unit, 1 driver, MC-659752, MCS-150 dated 2012-08-23, NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire). None match 106 Fairview Ave, Westwood NJ 07675, so the subject is a separate intrastate-only NJ livery with no FMCSA registration.
